metadata.source: pa_2020_presidential, pa_median_age, PA_Demographics_2025 (block groups, EPSG:3857 layers via Mercator PIP)
notes: diversity_index is normalized Shannon entropy of HS / some college / bachelor / grad shares (0–100).
owner_pct is a proxy from median home value (no ACS owner field in bundle).
population_density uses TOTPOP_CY from precinct feature when present, else 0; area from polygon.
